stimulus: If you visit the workshop of sculptor Pilar Mendes, you can expect to see hundreds of metal scraps arranged on every shelf. Mendes welds her pieces from salvaged items, everything from old bicycle frames to discarded kitchen utensils. She studies the texture of each scrap before incorporating ______blank into a sculpture.
stem: Which choice completes the text so that it conforms to the conventions of Standard English?
rationale:
Choice C is correct. The convention being tested is pronoun-antecedent agreement. The plural pronoun “them” agrees in number with the plural antecedent “scraps.”

Choices A, B, and D are all singular pronouns that don’t agree with the plural antecedent.
